top_signals.title: AAR slams “hypocrisy” as Trump-backed rail safety measure is included in transportation funding bill
top_signals.summary:
The Railway Safety Act opposed by railroads rode Trump’s backing to be included in surface transportation funding legislation.

The post AAR slams “hypocrisy” as Trump-backed rail safety measure is included in transportation funding bill appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Turkey Stocks Start Bouncing Back After Court Blow to Opposition
top_signals.summary: The pressure on Turkish stocks eased following a selloff sparked by a Turkish court decision on Thursday to remove the leadership of the country’s main opposition party.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
